close.comment: Superseded by KubeShip Phase 1 in this repo (PR #21). Application manifests live under `gitops/apps/kubeship/`; a separate app repo is optional.
Done via KubeShip Phase 1 (PR #21): Argo CD Application CRs in `gitops/clusters/*/applications.yaml` and install order in `scripts/gitops-install-order.sh`.
Couchbase backing service shipped with KubeShip (PR #21) under `gitops/platform/couchbase/`. Further services can be tracked as new issues when requirements are clear.

upsert.title: Cloud staging soak
upsert.body:
## Goal

Validate the full platform (including KubeShip) on a real cloud staging cluster, then destroy to control cost.

## Checklist

- [ ] Bootstrap AWS or Azure staging (`./scripts/bootstrap-aws.sh` or `bootstrap-azure.sh`)
- [ ] `verify-platform.sh` green (KubeShip Available + Istio sidecar)
- [ ] Hit KubeShip ingress or port-forward `/health`
- [ ] Document any cloud-specific fixes in a PR
- [ ] Tear down cluster when done

## References

- [docs/reference/project-status.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/reference/project-status.md)
- [docs/operations/verify.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/operations/verify.md)

## Tracking

Add this issue to the **infra — Phase 1** GitHub Project (`./scripts/setup-github-project.sh`).

upsert.title: First KubeShip production release
upsert.body:
## Goal

Run the production release pipeline for KubeShip and pin the prod GitOps overlay to a semver image tag.

## Checklist

- [ ] Staging image green on `main` (`build-kubeship-staging.yml`)
- [ ] Tag `v0.1.0` (or next semver) to trigger `release.yml`
- [ ] Confirm prod overlay references the published GHCR tag
- [ ] Document release steps in `docs/applications/kubeship.md` if anything differs from docs

## References

- `.github/workflows/release.yml`
- `gitops/apps/kubeship/overlays/prod/`

upsert.match_title: Security hardening — Helm pins and alerting
upsert.title: Security hardening — Helm pins and alerting
upsert.body:
## Goal

Move from lab defaults toward production-ready posture (still on staging first).

## Checklist

- [ ] Pin Helm chart versions for platform components
- [x] Replace bootstrap platform CA decision (or document explicit dev-only stance)
- [x] Wire Alertmanager receivers (lab null receiver documented; production Slack pattern in docs)
- [x] Kyverno CIS starter policies + KubeShip NetworkPolicy + PSA labels
- [x] EKS audit logs + KMS encryption; AKS Azure Policy ([security-baseline.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/operations/security-baseline.md))
- [x] kube-bench script (`scripts/run-kube-bench.sh`)
- [x] In-cluster KubeShip API sanity (`scripts/verify-kubeship.sh`)
- [x] Couchbase Community Edition image pin + [licenses.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/reference/licenses.md)
- [ ] Restrict Kubernetes API CIDRs for prod Terraform vars
- [ ] Rotate Grafana / Couchbase staging secrets off `changeme`
- [ ] Promote Kyverno Audit policies to Enforce

## References

- [docs/reference/project-status.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/reference/project-status.md) — maturity path step 4
- [docs/operations/alerting.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/operations/alerting.md)
- [docs/operations/cert-manager-provider.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/operations/cert-manager-provider.md)
- [docs/operations/security-baseline.md](https://github.com/panagiod/infra/blob/main/docs/operations/security-baseline.md)
